headline: Assessing Starbucks (SBUX) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Momentum And Balanced Growth Outlook
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Starbucks (SBUX) Without a single headline event driving attention today, Starbucks (SBUX) still offers plenty for investors to weigh, from its recent share performance to the scale of its global coffee operations. The stock’s recent returns show steady movement, with gains of 0.1% over the past day, 0.5% over the past week, about 7.6% over the past month, and roughly 11.2% over the past 3 months. Year to date, Starbucks posts a total return of 26.8%, while the...

headline: Elliott Management Exits Two Tech Stocks and Boosts Its Hewlett Packard Enterprise Stake
summary: Activist hedge fund Elliott Management increased its position in Hewlett Packard Enterprise while exiting investments in Bill Holdings and Sensata Technologies during the first quarter.

headline: Starbucks to Participate in the Bernstein 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference
summary: SEATTLE, May 21, 2026--Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ: SBUX) today announced that Brian Niccol, chairman and chief executive officer, and Cathy Smith, evp, chief financial officer, will host a fireside chat at the Bernstein 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on Thursday, May 28th, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

raw.headline: Starbucks to Participate in the Bernstein 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference

headline: Starbucks' China JV Shift Reshapes Revenue and Margin Outlook
summary: SBUX's Boyu China JV shifts China ops into licensing in Q3 FY26, cutting reported China revenues but boosting margins and adding $3.1B cash.
